findings.description: Go YAML last-key-wins silently drops duplicate keys at the same mapping level
findings.proposedRule: P48: Verify rendered output with helm template when conditionals produce structural YAML keys

findings.description: Three helm-unittest assertion edge cases: notExists vs isNullOrEmpty, equal vs contains for complex objects, template dependency listing
Tests relying on values.yaml defaults break silently when defaults change
findings.proposedRule: P50: Helm unit tests must explicitly set all values they assert on

findings.description: Dead key in values-test.yaml masked template bug for months
findings.proposedRule: P51: Verify values paths are consumed by templates
